author: SantiMod
content:
It's happening! 

We’re announcing 
the ReBirth meta-poster rewards snapshot & drop date:

 Snapshot: August 30, 2021 (PDT)
 Drop: August 31, 2021 (PDT)

 Make sure to have all your meta-posters consolidated in a single wallet before then! →
https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-announces-nft-loot-box-rewards-drop-for-rebirth-meta-poster-collectors-8de3c7909fc6
